subject: DHL: Your parcel requires customs clearance - Ref #4729183
preview: Your shipment is delayed pending a small release fee. Track the package now.
body_html:
Dear Customer,

Your parcel #4729183 is currently held at our distribution center pending a small customs clearance fee of $3.99.

Please review the tracking details and settle the balance to resume delivery.

Track Shipment

Reference: DHL-4729183-US
